blended.narrative: Bromont is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 67 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: light rain showers, highs of 56°F.
Tuesday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 60°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
